title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mindtree

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mindtree
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Mindtree in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindtree:
Mindtree is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree!
